name: Oaklore Navigation
description: Awarded for successfully navigating the dangers around Oaklore Keep. One of the first badges a hero can earn.
requirements: Completion of 'Ambush in the Bushes' in Oaklore

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to Oaklore (from the Book of Lore or main map)
Complete the quest 'Ambush in the Bushes' from Captain Rolith

name: Locksmith
description: A secret badge earned by those sharp enough to notice and attempt a very peculiar door inside Oaklore Keep.
requirements: Successfully lockpick the 'Level 999' door in Oaklore Keep

howToObtain.instruction: Enter Oaklore Keep
Find the door with the 'Level 999' note on it
Attempt to lockpick the door — success awards the badge

name: Baby Dragon
description: Awarded for witnessing the hatching of your very own dragon companion, a pivotal moment in every hero's journey.
requirements: Completion of 'The Hatching' from Twilly in Falconreach

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to Falconreach and speak with Twilly
Complete the quest 'The Hatching' (Book 1 or Book 2)
Watch your dragon egg hatch to receive the badge

name: Idle Heroes
description: Earned by enjoying a theatrical diversion. Because even heroes need a night off.
requirements: Complete 'Falconreach Idle!' and 'We now return to your show!' from Zevox

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to Book 1 Falconreach and find Zevox at the Theatre
Complete the quest 'Falconreach Idle!'
Complete the follow-up quest 'We now return to your show!'

name: Undead Slayer
description: Proof that you've fought alongside Artix in the battle against the undead. Collect badges to move the story forward and redeem for Paladin class skills.
requirements: Complete any of Artix's random quests at the Necropolis

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to the Necropolis and speak with Artix
Complete any of Artix's random quests (Battle for Moonridge!, Artix Vs. The Undead, The TA's Challenge, The Outcast, Too Many Cooks, The Body Shop, Noxus Fumes, Moonridge: Saved!)
Each quest completion rewards one Undead Slayer Badge
15 badges needed for Paladin skills; 31 total for DeathKnight

notes: This badge is repeatable. You can farm multiple Undead Slayer Badges to progress Paladin and DeathKnight class training.

name: Secrets of Bacon!
description: The universe's greatest mysteries revealed, specifically the ones involving bacon. Valencia holds all the answers.
requirements: Completion of 'The Secret Revealed' from Valencia at That A'Way

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to 'That A'Way' and find Valencia
Complete the quest 'The Secret Revealed'

name: The Mystery is Afoot!
description: Awarded to those who unravel a sinister betrayal in Dragonsgrasp, following Inspector Doyle's trail of clues.
requirements: Completion of 'Betrayal' from Inspector Doyle at Dragonsgrasp

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to Dragonsgrasp
Find Inspector Doyle and begin his quest chain
Complete the quest 'Betrayal' to earn the badge

forumLinks.title: Wiki: The Mystery is Afoot! Badge

name: A'maze'n
description: For those who've conquered the depths of the Lymcrest Labyrinth, all twenty grueling levels of it.
requirements: Complete Levels 16-20 of The Lymcrest Labyrinth

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to Book 1 or Book 2 Lymcrest
Find Doug Digg and enter The Lymcrest Labyrinth
Complete Levels 16 through 20 of the Labyrinth

name: Party On, Olaf!
description: Celebrating the one and only Olaf's legendary party in the frozen north. Galanoth sends his regards.
requirements: Completion of 'Olaf's Party' from Galanoth at Dragesvard

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to Dragesvard in the frozen north
Find Galanoth and accept 'Olaf's Party' quest
Complete the quest to earn the badge

name: Pet Training Mastery
description: Awarded for completing every pet training quest in the Pet Shop. A testament to patience and dedication.
requirements: Complete all 7 Pet Training Quests at the Pet Shop

howToObtain.instruction: Travel to the Pet Shop (accessible from Falconreach)
Complete all 7 Pet Training Quests
You must roll high enough values in each quest to get the pet
4 of the 7 quests require a Dragon Amulet

notes: 4 of the 7 quests are Dragon Amulet (DA) locked, making this badge effectively DA-only.

name: Golem Breaker
description: For the hero who fought through Chapter 4 of the Frostval Storybook and helped deal with a very large, very cold golem problem.
requirements: Completion of 'We're Gonna Need More Fire...' from Frostval Storybook Ch.4

howToObtain.instruction: Access the Frostval Storybook (available during Frostval event)
Progress through the Frostval story to Chapter 4
Complete the quest 'We're Gonna Need More Fire...'

name: A Hero is Thawed
requirements: Completion of A Hero is Thawed

howToObtain.instruction: Complete the quest 'A Hero is Thawed'

forumLinks.title: DF Encyclopedia: A Hero is Thawed Badge

notes: Badge art was added on July 27th, 2024.
